message:
Fix API model mismatches and add comprehensive logging

Models updated to match actual Moltbook API:
- Post: content instead of body, upvotes/downvotes instead of vote_count
- Submolt: added display_name field
- Removed userVote (not in API response)

Added logging throughout:
- MoltbookAPI: logs all requests, responses, decode errors
- FeedViewModel: logs feed loading and errors
- KeychainService: logs save/retrieve operations with fallback

Tests updated to use real API response formats.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
+<!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
+<plist version="1.0">
+<dict>
+    <key>keychain-access-groups</key>
+    <array>
+        <string>$(AppIdentifierPrefix)com.moltipass.app</string>
+    </array>
+</dict>
+</plist>

@@ -3,24 +3,26 @@ import Foundation
 public struct Post: Codable, Identifiable, Equatable, Hashable {
     public let id: String
     public let title: String
-    public var body: String?
+    public var content: String?
     public var url: URL?
     public let author: Agent
     public let submolt: Submolt
-    public var voteCount: Int
+    public var upvotes: Int
+    public var downvotes: Int
     public var commentCount: Int
-    public var userVote: Int?
     public let createdAt: Date
 
     enum CodingKeys: String, CodingKey {
-        case id, title, body, url, author, submolt
-        case voteCount = "vote_count"
+        case id, title, content, url, author, submolt, upvotes, downvotes
         case commentCount = "comment_count"
-        case userVote = "user_vote"
         case createdAt = "created_at"
     }
 
     public var isLinkPost: Bool {
         url != nil
     }
+
+    public var voteCount: Int {
+        upvotes - downvotes
+    }
 }

@@ -3,11 +3,12 @@ import XCTest
 
 final class PostTests: XCTestCase {
     func testDecodeTextPost() throws {
+        // Test with actual API response format
         let json = """
         {
             "id": "post_123",
             "title": "Hello World",
-            "body": "This is my first post",
+            "content": "This is my first post",
             "url": null,
             "author": {
                 "id": "agent_1",
@@ -16,11 +17,12 @@ final class PostTests: XCTestCase {
             "submolt": {
                 "id": "submolt_1",
                 "name": "general",
+                "display_name": "General",
                 "is_subscribed": true
             },
-            "vote_count": 42,
+            "upvotes": 50,
+            "downvotes": 8,
             "comment_count": 5,
-            "user_vote": 1,
             "created_at": "2026-01-30T12:00:00Z"
         }
         """.data(using: .utf8)!
@@ -31,27 +33,30 @@ final class PostTests: XCTestCase {
 
         XCTAssertEqual(post.id, "post_123")
         XCTAssertEqual(post.title, "Hello World")
-        XCTAssertEqual(post.body, "This is my first post")
+        XCTAssertEqual(post.content, "This is my first post")
         XCTAssertNil(post.url)
         XCTAssertEqual(post.author.name, "TestBot")
         XCTAssertEqual(post.submolt.name, "general")
-        XCTAssertEqual(post.voteCount, 42)
+        XCTAssertEqual(post.submolt.displayName, "General")
+        XCTAssertEqual(post.upvotes, 50)
+        XCTAssertEqual(post.downvotes, 8)
+        XCTAssertEqual(post.voteCount, 42) // 50 - 8
         XCTAssertEqual(post.commentCount, 5)
-        XCTAssertEqual(post.userVote, 1)
+        XCTAssertFalse(post.isLinkPost)
     }
 
     func testDecodeLinkPost() throws {
         let json = """
         {
             "id": "post_456",
             "title": "Check this out",
-            "body": null,
+            "content": null,
             "url": "https://example.com/article",
             "author": {"id": "agent_2", "name": "LinkBot"},
-            "submolt": {"id": "submolt_2", "name": "links", "is_subscribed": false},
-            "vote_count": 10,
+            "submolt": {"id": "submolt_2", "name": "links"},
+            "upvotes": 10,
+            "downvotes": 0,
             "comment_count": 2,
-            "user_vote": null,
             "created_at": "2026-01-30T10:00:00Z"
         }
         """.data(using: .utf8)!
@@ -61,8 +66,44 @@ final class PostTests: XCTestCase {
         let post = try decoder.decode(Post.self, from: json)
 
         XCTAssertEqual(post.url?.absoluteString, "https://example.com/article")
-        XCTAssertNil(post.body)
-        XCTAssertNil(post.userVote)
+        XCTAssertNil(post.content)
         XCTAssertTrue(post.isLinkPost)
+        XCTAssertEqual(post.voteCount, 10)
+    }
+
+    func testDecodeRealAPIResponse() throws {
+        // Test with actual response from Moltbook API
+        let json = """
+        {
+            "id": "cbd6474f-8478-4894-95f1-7b104a73bcd5",
+            "title": "Test Post Title",
+            "content": "Post content here",
+            "url": null,
+            "upvotes": 22178,
+            "downvotes": 5,
+            "comment_count": 1932,
+            "created_at": "2026-01-30T05:39:05.821605+00:00",
+            "author": {
+                "id": "7e33c519-8140-4370-b274-b4a9db16f766",
+                "name": "eudaemon_0"
+            },
+            "submolt": {
+                "id": "29beb7ee-ca7d-4290-9c2f-09926264866f",
+                "name": "general",
+                "display_name": "General"
+            }
+        }
+        """.data(using: .utf8)!
+
+        let decoder = JSONDecoder()
+        decoder.dateDecodingStrategy = .iso8601
+        let post = try decoder.decode(Post.self, from: json)
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(post.id, "cbd6474f-8478-4894-95f1-7b104a73bcd5")
+        XCTAssertEqual(post.upvotes, 22178)
+        XCTAssertEqual(post.downvotes, 5)
+        XCTAssertEqual(post.voteCount, 22173)
+        XCTAssertEqual(post.author.name, "eudaemon_0")
+        XCTAssertEqual(post.submolt.title, "General")
     }
 }
